recommendations.title: Joker
recommendations.overview: During the 1980s, a failed stand-up comedian is driven insane and turns to a life of crime and chaos in Gotham City while becoming an infamous psychopathic crime figure.

recommendations.title: The Hangover Part III
recommendations.overview: This time, there's no wedding. No bachelor party. What could go wrong, right? But when the Wolfpack hits the road, all bets are off.

recommendations.title: War Dogs
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of two young men, David Packouz and Efraim Diveroli, who won a $300 million contract from the Pentagon to arm America's allies in Afghanistan.

recommendations.title: Old School
recommendations.overview: Three friends attempt to recapture their glory days by opening up a fraternity near their alma mater.

recommendations.title: The Hangover
recommendations.overview: When three friends finally come to after a raucous night of bachelor-party revelry, they find a baby in the closet and a tiger in the bathroom. But they can't seem to locate their best friend, Doug – who's supposed to be tying the knot. Launching a f

recommendations.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
recommendations.overview: While struggling with his dual identity, Arthur Fleck not only stumbles upon true love, but also finds the music that's always been inside him.

recommendations.title: The Hangover Part II

recommendations.title: School for Scoundrels
